root.name: CACTUS AI
root.description: Android-native local AI node with OpenAI-compatible bridge and AIVR Core mesh integration.

children.name: CORE.LLM
children.description: Local LLM inference management using CactusLM SDK.

children.name: MODEL.REPOSITORY
children.description: Dynamic weight registry and local storage management.

children.name: MODEL.DOWNLOAD
children.description: Network synchronization of GGUF model weights.

children.name: MODEL.SUPPORT_VALIDATION
children.description: Validation of Requested Model against Target Device (NPU/GPU/CPU/XPU) via PCI Device ID and Numeric Unit Identifier mapping.

children.name: MODEL.INITIALIZE
children.description: VRAM allocation and model loading sequence.

children.name: BENCHMARK.SUITE
children.description: Automated performance auditing of all linguistic devices (CPU1, GPU1, etc.) against model weight compatibility.

children.name: BRIDGE.OPENAI
children.description: Local HTTP server providing OpenAI-compatible endpoints with AIVR Core mesh integration.

children.name: SERVER.STATUS
children.description: Real-time monitoring of node connection and uptime.

children.name: SERVER.DEVICE_DISCOVERY
children.description: API endpoint (/v1/internal/devices) returning validated linguistic identifiers (CPU1, GPU1) linked to specific validated hardware chips.

children.name: SERVER.MODELS_ENDPOINT
children.description: Dynamic /v1/models endpoint listing all downloaded models with metadata for AIVR Core discovery.

children.name: SERVER.AUTH
children.description: Optional Bearer token API key authentication middleware.

children.name: SERVER.ERROR_FORMAT
children.description: OpenAI-spec compliant error responses with type, message, and code fields.

children.name: BRIDGE.AIVR_CORE
children.description: Integration with AIVR Core mesh for node registration, token reporting, and model relay.

children.name: MESH.REGISTRATION
children.description: UDP-based node registration/deregistration with AIVR mesh (Port 12000).

children.name: MESH.HEARTBEAT
children.description: Periodic heartbeat to Service-Relay (Port 9800) with node health stats.

children.name: TOKEN.REPORTING
children.description: Per-request token usage reporting to AIVR Orchestrator for node crediting.

children.name: MODEL.RELAY
children.description: Advertising available models to the mesh for cross-node discovery.

children.name: NATIVE.BRIDGE
children.description: C++ FFI bridge (mobile_bridge.cpp) exposing AIVR Core functions to Flutter.

children.name: INTERFACE.AGENT
children.description: Local agent chat interface using loaded model for direct inference.

children.name: INTERFACE.LIVE
children.description: Neural Audio Bridge for voice-to-voice interaction.

children.name: INTERFACE.SENSORS
children.description: Hardware telemetry (Battery/Geo) integration.

statusDefinitions.PARTIAL: Some parts working; not fully completed or validated.
statusDefinitions.SIMULATED: No real function; mimics behavior for testing/demo.
